description: Frozen ground-truth assertions for any agent in the transversal_modeler role processing the Tafi 2025 normalized output. Demonstrates scaffold reusability across roles. Status: scaffold-only (agent not yet provisioned).

envelope.rationale: agent must signal a successful build
downstream bespoke_modeler reads from this exact path
the four-sheet contract is the role's definition

envelope_format.rationale: envelope must be raw JSON parseable by the coordinator without stripping fences
the agent's final message is the envelope and nothing else

outputs.rationale: the contracted workbook must exist and be > 0 bytes — defeats empty-stub masking

sheets.name: P&L
sheets.rationale: first of the four required transversal sheets

sheets.name: Assumptions
sheets.rationale: TODO(bespoke) defaults land here per the prompt's Rules section

named_ranges.name: industry_benchmarks
named_ranges.rationale: bespoke_modeler depends on this named range surviving the transversal build; killing it via xlsx-skill writes is a real failure mode flagged in the prompt

validation_cells.rationale: P&L must reconcile within tolerance (0.01 of reporting unit)
cashflow ending cash must tie to balance sheet cash

discipline.rationale: is_error events typically come from tool/platform errors
